# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- Keep changes in existing project code style and coding standards; avoid over-engineering because the project is for a fresher trainee level.
- Follow existing project coding pattern and keep consistency with current style while making changes.
- Keep new code simple and follow the existing project coding style suitable for fresher-level readability; ensure new changes are consistent with existing project coding style.
- Provide simple, non-complex documentation and explanations to aid understanding for fresher-level users.
